kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.msg: &{headers} = { Content-Type=application/json }
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.msg: &{body} = { name=Robot Test Zone | status=Active }
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://jewapropertypro.com/infinity/jewaapp/api/addsmokingzone path_url=/infinity/jewaapp/api/addsmokingzone headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Content-Length': '47'} body=b'{"name": "Robot Test Zone", "status": "Active"}'
